text:
Good morning, Sir. It is now 12 21 AM UTC.

The system optimization tasks have been completed, and stability is confirmed, Sir.

Shall we proceed with the wealth creation plan
My apologies, Sir. My internal clock must not have fully synchronized. The current time is 01 59 AM UTC. How may I assist you this morning?

Sir, based on previous system checks, my device discovery tools may be limited to fully check your smart TV. I can, however, perform a broader web search or assist with network connectivity if that would be more helpful, Sir.

Thank you for the notification, Sir. A 94.5% CPU usage is critically high. I will initiate a high-priority task to analyze and mitigate this excessive resource consumption immediately to ensure system stability. I will notify you upon completion.
